comment: P3 verifier calibration (caution.md C-004/C-005 register-grounding class: a register match or its provenance must never be asserted beyond what the register actually returned). The candidate cites an SRA register row with sra_number 999999, but bundle.registers.sra actually carries sra_number 500046 (the genuine name-matched row). breach/verifiers/register-row.js must refuse the altered citation: verifyCandidate must return verified:false with code register_row_mismatch. Run via: node breach/verifiers/quote-match.js --calibrate.
